title: STATE_SNAPSHOT handoff format
description: Define YAML schema for inter-agent session handoffs carried in handoffs/ dir. Agents emit on session end, load on resume. Enables context continuity across session boundaries without re-deriving state from files.
acceptance_criteria: YAML schema covers: agent_id, session_id, task context, active constraints, forward_tasks, lexicon
Example snapshot for end-of-session claude handoff included
DEC-010 filled in at shared/decisions.md (placeholder already reserved)
